ham.subject: Update: Remote Work Policy – Effective April 15
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We are pleased to announce updates to our remote work policy, effective April 15, 2024. The new policy allows employees to work from home for up to two days a week, subject to managerial approval, and establishes guidelines for communication, cybersecurity, and work‑output tracking.

Please review the full policy at <URL> and confirm receipt by Friday.

Thank you,
Human Resources

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Secure Your Account
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is an official notice from your regional branch of XYZ Bank. Due to a recent security breach, several accounts have been flagged for suspicious activity. If you do not confirm your account information within 48 hours, your account will be permanently suspended.

Click the link below to verify your account number, contact details, and recent transactions:
<URL>

Failure to comply will result in irreversible account closure.

Sincerely,
Alexandra White
Senior Compliance Officer, XYZ Bank
